title: Codex Consult Output
description: Structured advisory output returned by /codex:consult. Claude Code reads this JSON and integrates it as supplementary input while remaining the canonical planner. All fields are required to satisfy OpenAI strict structured-output mode; use empty strings or empty arrays where a value is not meaningful.

summary.description: One-paragraph TL;DR Claude can scan first. Non-empty.

findings.description: 0-20 findings, ordered by importance. Empty array is allowed (e.g. a plan-critique with no material concerns).

evidence.description: Citation (plan heading, file path, principle). Use empty string when not applicable.

suggestion.description: Concrete advisory next step. Use empty string when Claude has already decided the path forward.

disagreements.description: Only populated in mode="second-opinion". Use empty array for other modes or when fully agreeing with Claude.

open_questions.description: Sub-questions Codex could not resolve from the provided context. Use empty array when none.
